sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 6:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 6:1
items.html: A measure of level that emerges primarily on the coarseness of phase one is called HaVaYaH of Alephs. (Item 56, and Inner Light, Sub Header, “In Yods”)
